tokens: We are on about the middle of page 28, Surface (checklist page) 28.
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: We're coming up in about 6 minutes on GET of 108.
If you'd like to start your event timer, we can give you a hack at 108:00.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: We're ready to start with the electrical checkout.
We're going to S-band modulate FM.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: And we missed the mark at 108.
Do you want us to try and give you one at 108:05?
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: I think we've got the timer going.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: We copy, and you're in sync with us.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: Well, we've got antennas down and (garbled) not real good (garbled)
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: Okay; how do you read now?
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: I think that's going to be better.
(Pause) You read me all right now?
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: I guess it's a combination of the volume and the antenna.
May have been just the volume that was way up too high.
Why don't you try stowing it again; see if that makes any (difference).
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Better keep it (the microphone) pretty close to your mouth, though.
(Reading from the checklist) Open up your audio circuit breaker, and disconnect the LM Comm cable.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Houston, Columbia on the high gain.
transcript.speaker: Collins

tokens: Reading you loud and clear on the high gain.
We have enabled the one-way MSFN relay that you requested.
The crew of Tranquility Base is currently donning PLSSs.
The LMP has his PLSS on, Comm checks out, and the CDR is checking his Comm out now.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: I tweaked the (inertial) platform up on the back side.
I have a P52 option 3 when you're ready to copy the data.
transcript.speaker: Collins

tokens: Stars 43 and 44: star angle difference four balls one, Noun 93 plus 000...
transcript.speaker: Collins

tokens: All right, on your panel, VHF A, Off; VHF B, Off.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Copy star angle difference of 4 balls 1; Noun 93, plus 00057...
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: You've got an O and a P.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: What is your O quantity, by the way?
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: Now I'm going to Mode Select B.
(Pause) That where you want to be?
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Verify PLSS O bottle pressure greater than 85.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Do you have voice with "each other".
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: We're reading you loud and clear.
Buzz, this is Houston through Tranquility.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: We're reading you loud and clear, Buzz.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: And you're getting a signal on the TV?
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: The data that we're receiving looks good and we are receiving Sync pulses and a black signal on TV.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: You'll find that the area around the ladder is in a complete dark shadow, so we're going to have some problem with TV, but I'm sure you'll get a picture from the lighted horizon (garbled).
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: We copy, and right toward the end of your transmission after you mentioned "lighted horizon", you trailed off down into the noise level, Neil.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: Are you reading Tranquility all right on the relay?
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: I haven't heard anything from him lately, and it's breaking up.
But up until about 3 minutes ago, I was reading them loud and clear.
transcript.speaker: Collins

tokens: Sounds like you're getting it all.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: We request you open the TV circuit breaker at the present time.
We've had it on about 15 minutes now with the MESA closed.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: I can hear you trying to transmit; however, your transmission is breaking up.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: You're coming through loud and clear, Buzz.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: Neil's got his antenna up now.
Let's see if he comes through any better now.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: We copy (that) your antenna (is) scratching the roof.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: Do we have a Go for cabin depress?
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: We're standing by for a Go for cabin depress.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: You are Go for cabin depressurization.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: Okay, Descent Water Valve is Closed.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Verify Cabin Fan Number 1 circuit breaker open.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: We'll have to pull that one out.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Your LM line-of-sight Comm acquisition with the Tranquility Base is 108 plus 29.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: I'm going over to (garbled) I'll pick you up...
transcript.speaker: Collins

tokens: Takes a while for the water separator.
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: Suit Fan Number 1 circuit breaker, Open.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: We'd like you to pull the Suit Fan Delta-P circuit breaker on panel 16.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: ECS (caution light), Master Alarm, Water Separator(caution light).
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Let me do that for you.
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: (Connecting Neil's OPS hose) Raise your arm up.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Verify (that the purge valve is) closed; lock pin installed.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Install in red (coded connector), PGA red (garbled, undoubtedly "connector").
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: That's right on your...(over) the middle (of the suit front).
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: Hold this (possibly Neil's Red Apple and the attached pull-pin).
I'll put in your purge valve.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: (Long Pause) Sure wished I'd shaved last night.
Got your mikes where you want them?
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Verify PLSS (comm) mode select in AR.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: I don't know if you guys can read me on VHF, but you sure sound good down there.
transcript.speaker: Collins

tokens: And remove LEVA (Lunar Extravehicular Visor Assembly) from the engine cover.
Verify EV visor is up and attach to helmet.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: You are coming in loud and clear, and Mike passes on the word that he is receiving you and following your progress with interest.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: (Long Pause) Got all the material up in the back?
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Now, if you'll pull the RCU down.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Wonder if we're triggering (the voice-activated comm) all the time.
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: Read you loud and clear and I read both the comments that said: "I wonder if we're triggering all the time" and "I don't think so." Prior to that it was relatively quiet.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: We're hearing a little bit of background noise, and I just wanted to make sure that we weren't continually keyed.
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: Want to put the light back up?
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: We can stow this (probably the Lunar Surface Checklist, as per the last step on
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Now we should be able to stow these (LM water) hoses.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Any joy on the LM that pass?
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: Our Comm just seemed to clear up a good bit.
Did CSM just go over the hill (out of direct VHF line-of-sight)?
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: He's been over the hill, here, for a minute or so.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: ...he should be losing contact with you in about a minute.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: Locks are checked, blue locks are checked, lock-locks, red locks, purge locks; and on this side, the PLSS locks and lock-locks, both sides; water locks (pause) and the Comm.
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: Columbia reads you loud and clear on Omni C/Charlie.
transcript.speaker: Collins

tokens: Columbia, I have LOS and AOS times for you this pass with MSFN.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: And mine's running, also, and it's cooling already.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: (Garbled) Why don't you bend down and let me stow that (antenna).
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Were you successful in spotting the LM on that pass?
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: I checked both locations, and no joy.
transcript.speaker: Collins

tokens: If you'd like to look again next pass, we have a different set of coordinates based on the onboard P57 solution of the LM.
These are Echo decimal three and four decimal eight.
I say again Echo 0.3, 4.8, same chart.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: And, also, how about putting that in your machine and coming out with some coordinates - latitude and longitude over two, and altitude - for P22, so it can help me as best it can.
transcript.speaker: Collins

tokens: That P22 is still pointing in the wrong place.
transcript.speaker: Collins

tokens: Latitude plus 0 decimal 523, longitude divided by two, 11 decimal 710.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: We're requesting high-gain antenna pitch 0, yaw 200.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: I got you a little bit better now.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: (To Neil) You're not too loud and clear, but I think it's the same problem.
Houston, how do you read Buzz?
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Oh, I think it'll be a lot easier (than in training) (Pause)
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: We want to go to (brief pause while he finds the line in the checklist) Dump and go down to 3.5 (psi) and back to Auto.
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: "Verify cabin pressure at 3.5 and LM Suit Circuit pressure between 3.6 and 4.3."
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: "Verify the PGA pressure is above 4.5." Mine is 4.6.
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: Will you give us a hack when you start your (Omega) chronometer.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: Houston, I'll set my watch at 56.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Houston, Columbia is back on the high gain.
transcript.speaker: Collins

tokens: And we copied your mark there, Buzz.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: You want to bring down one of your visors now or leave them up?
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Four-tenths of a pound in the cabin.
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: Sure takes a long time to get all the way down, doesn't it?
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Okay, let me see if it will open now.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Bumping my RCU, there, with your visor.
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: (Long Pause) Get a steady tone in the background?
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: I've got a little bit of a steady tone.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: I don't guess I hear that.
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: What's your status on hatch opening?
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: We're just waiting for the cabin pressure to bleed so...To blow enough pressure to open the hatch.
It's about 0.1 (psi) on our gauge now.
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: Sure hate to tug on that thing.
Alternative would be to open the top one, too.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: We're showing a relatively static pressure on your cabin.
Do you think you can open the hatch at this pressure of about 0.12 psi?
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: Hold it from going closed and I'll get the valve to (Auto)...
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: We'd like you to cycle the fans in cryo(genic) hydrogen tank number 1.
And LOS time this orbit is 111:19:31.
Make that for the next orbit.
You already have the AOS/LOS for this orbit.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: Roger on the time; and you want to cycle the fan...
transcript.speaker: Collins

tokens: (To Neil) (have you) turned your water valve on (garbled)?
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: We show you nearing high-gain antenna scan limits.
When you lose lock on us, we request Omni Delta.
Omni Delta when you lose lock.
transcript.speaker: McCandless

tokens: I'm going to go to...Run my cooling up a little bit.
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: Yeah; and we've got a water separator light...
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Okay; and I'll look at your cabin fan 1 circuit breaker.
And you look at the glycol secondary.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Glycol pump secondary circuit breaker open?
transcript.speaker: Armstrong

tokens: My cabin fan 1 (circuit breaker is) open.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin

tokens: Well, I'm looking head on at it.
transcript.speaker: Aldrin
